minecraft:scatter_feature.iterations: t.noise_val = 1;t.tmp_noise_val = q.noise(9573 + v.worldx/300, -2137 + v.worldz/300);t.tmp_noise_val = 0.0 + (t.tmp_noise_val - -1.0) * (1.0 - 0.0) / (1.0 - -1.0);t.noise_val = t.noise_val * t.tmp_noise_val;return (math.random(0, 1) < 0.65 && math.random(0.85, 0.9) <= t.noise_val && t.noise_val <= 1.0) != 0;
